caption: The video captures an aerial view of a large military airfield under a partly cloudy sky. A line of helicopters is seen taxiing along a runway, moving in a synchronized manner. The helicopters are evenly spaced and appear to be preparing for takeoff or repositioning. In the background, several other aircraft are parked on various sections of the airfield, indicating a busy and active base. The surrounding area includes patches of green grass and additional runways, suggesting a well-maintained and expansive facility. The overall scene conveys a sense of order and readiness within a military aviation environment.
